session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root (/home/runner/work/erk/erk) and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target from repository root

session.assistant:
## Results: make fast-ci PASSED
All checks passed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed! - **Format Check**: 1667 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style! - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed! - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5903 passed in 12.61s - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.45s - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.80s - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Standard**: PASSED (19 files checked, 0 violations)
**Summary**: The fast-ci target completed successfully with all linting, formatting, type checking, and unit tests passing.
